# pruning.PruneResult { #tspaint.pruning.PruneResult }

```python
tspaint.pruning.PruneResult(gamma, xi, root_marginal, missing_info, loo, loglik)
```

Down-pass result of pruning a marginal tree (CLAUDE.md §3.1).

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**gamma**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``node -> (K,) posterior marginal P(state \| tree)``.

<code>[**xi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(parent, child) -> (K, K) joint posterior`` over endpoint states.

<code>[**root_marginal**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``root -> (K,) posterior`` (also present in ``gamma``).

<code>[**missing_info**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[set](`set`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Isolated-sample nodes the tree carries no information about (distinct from a 50-50 uncertain call; CLAUDE.md §4.2).

<code>[**loo**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``node -> (K,) leave-one-out marginal``: the outside message excluding the node's OWN emission — credibility evidence that avoids a label confirming itself (CLAUDE.md §2.3, §3.3).

<code>[**loglik**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Total log-likelihood, summed over roots.
